wolkenkraft-aris-ultra-copy.summary: A compact conduction dry-herb vaporiser for patients who want straightforward, pocketable medicating.
wolkenkraft-aris-ultra-copy.description: The Wolkenkraft ViTA is a small one-button conduction vaporiser that heats up in 25 to 30 seconds. Five settings between 180 and 220C, an insulated air path and a ceramic filter keep the vapour clean and reasonably cool. The 1600mAh battery charges over USB-C and supports pass-through use, so you can medicate while it tops up. A sensible entry-level device for patients who want simple operation without much to learn.

wolkenkraft-aris-ultra-gun-metal.summary: A true-convection portable with an OLED screen and programmable sessions for patients who want precise control.
wolkenkraft-aris-ultra-gun-metal.description: The Wolkenkraft Aris Ultra uses full convection, so only the air passing through the chamber is heated, which keeps flavour clean and consistent dose to dose. Temperature is adjustable from 160 to 221C on an OLED display, with a memory function for three saved settings and a session mode that steps the heat up through a session. A 2300mAh battery charges fast over USB-C, and a stealth mode dims the screen for discreet use. It ships with a dosing capsule, brush, tweezers and a carry case, and carries a five-year warranty. A good fit for patients who want convection accuracy and want to dial in their own routine.

wolkenkraft-aris.summary: A full-convection portable vaporiser with OLED control, for patients who want clean flavour in a compact body.
wolkenkraft-aris.description: The Wolkenkraft Aris is a compact convection device that heats only the air drawn through your herb, giving pure flavour and even extraction. Temperature runs from 160 to 221C on a high-resolution OLED screen, with a memory function and a stealth mode that dims the display for discretion. It heats up in around 30 seconds and runs on a 2300mAh USB-C battery, with a zirconium ceramic mouthpiece and cooling path to smooth each draw. Backed by a five-year warranty, it suits patients who want convection quality without stepping up to the larger Ultra.

wolkenkraft-fx-mini-ultra.summary: A pocket-sized convection vaporiser with full temperature control, for patients who want discreet, portable dosing.
wolkenkraft-fx-mini-ultra.description: The Wolkenkraft FX Mini Ultra packs true convection heating into a small body, heating up in under 30 seconds. Temperature is adjustable from 160 to 221C on an OLED display, with a memory function, a session mode that steps the heat through a session, and a stealth mode for discreet use. The 1600mAh battery charges over USB-C and covers several sessions per charge. Trade-off is the smaller battery against the larger Aris, but for patients who prioritise pocketability with convection quality, it earns its place; five-year warranty included.

wolkenkraft-fx-mini.summary: A compact German-engineered convection vaporiser for dry herb, suited to patients wanting portable precision.
wolkenkraft-fx-mini.description: The Wolkenkraft FX Mini is a small convection device that heats only the air passing through your herb for clean, efficient extraction. It reaches temperature in around 30 seconds, with adjustable settings from 160 to 221C shown on a bright OLED display alongside battery and session timer. A titanium chamber and food-grade Pyrex mouthpiece keep flavour pure, and the 1600mAh battery gives roughly six to eight sessions per charge. With a concentrate capsule included it also handles wax and oil, making it a versatile, genuinely pocketable option for patients.

wolkenkraft-live.summary: A large desktop-grade convection portable with deep temperature range and programmable stages, for committed daily patients.
wolkenkraft-live.description: The Wolkenkraft LIVE is the brand's most capable portable, using a patented convection system and a Coolscreen ceramic cooling module to deliver smooth, evenly heated vapour. The temperature range is unusually wide at 40 to 220C, controlled on a 1.3-inch RGB display with four-button operation and no app required. A sequence mode lets you program up to three heat stages, and a stealth mode dims the display with vibration alerts. The 3000mAh battery, titanium chamber and zirconium ceramic mouthpiece make it a serious tool, though at 311g it is large and the price is high. Worth it for patients who medicate heavily and want full session control; five-year warranty.

x-max-starry-vaporizer.summary: An affordable conduction vaporiser for dry herb and concentrate, suited to patients new to vaping or on a budget.
x-max-starry-vaporizer.description: The XMAX Starry V4 is a long-running budget portable now in its fourth revision. It uses conduction heating with adjustable temperature on a full OLED display, charges over USB-C and runs on a replaceable Samsung 18650 battery, so you can carry spares for all-day use. A ceramic chamber and zirconia mouthpiece keep the vapour reasonably clean, and a concentrate pad is included for wax. A practical, low-cost starting point for patients who want a capable device without committing to a flagship price.

xmax-oont.summary: A budget convection vaporiser for dry herb with haptic feedback, suited to patients wanting low-cost simplicity.
xmax-oont.description: The XMAX OONT Pro is a small, low-cost convection device with five temperature settings and a quick heat-up. It signals readiness through haptic feedback rather than a screen, keeping operation simple, and charges over USB-C. A ceramic chamber and zirconia mouthpiece keep flavour clean, with adjustable airflow to suit your draw. One of the most affordable convection options here, it suits patients who want convection extraction without much complexity or expense.

xmax-v3-nano.summary: An ultra-portable single-button vaporiser for dry herb, for patients who want the simplest possible device.
xmax-v3-nano.description: The XMAX V3 Nano strips things back to one button and no temperature menu, running a fixed preset range of 200 to 220C. You triple-click to switch on and draw; there is nothing to set up. It charges over USB-C on a 1000mAh battery and is small enough to disappear into a pocket. The trade-off is no temperature choice, but for casual or new patients who just want something straightforward, that simplicity is the point.

xmax-v3-pro.summary: A hybrid heating vaporiser for herb and concentrate with a replaceable battery, for patients wanting versatility on a budget.
xmax-v3-pro.description: The XMAX V3 Pro is a pen-style device using hybrid conduction and convection heating, ready in about 15 seconds. It takes dry herb, concentrates and oils, with a ceramic chamber and ceramic vapour path for clean flavour and precise manual temperature control from 180 to 220C. The replaceable 18650 battery means you can carry spares rather than wait on a charge, and it runs through one-button operation with haptic feedback. A capable all-rounder for patients who want flexibility without a flagship price.

xmax-v4-pro-vaporizer.summary: A full-convection pen vaporiser for dry herb with session and on-demand modes, for patients wanting precise mid-range control.
xmax-v4-pro-vaporizer.description: The XMAX V4 Pro uses true convection, passing hot air evenly through your herb for efficient extraction and good flavour retention. Temperature is adjustable in 1C steps from 100 to 220C on an OLED screen, with both session and on-demand modes and three airflow levels. It heats up in around 11 seconds, runs on a replaceable 18650 battery over USB-C, and includes a built-in 14mm/18mm water-pipe adapter for use with a bong. The fully isolated air path and ceramic chamber keep vapour clean. A strong choice for patients who want convection accuracy and on-demand dosing at a fair price.

xvape-aria.summary: A conduction vaporiser for herb and concentrate with a large battery, for patients wanting long sessions in one device.
xvape-aria.description: The Xvape Aria+ is a compact conduction device with a full ceramic oven and ceramic mouthpiece, ready in about 15 to 20 seconds. It handles both dry herb and concentrates, with a wide 100 to 240C range on an OLED display showing temperature, battery and session status. The 2600mAh battery supports extended use with USB-C pass-through charging, and a built-in stir tool helps even out extraction. Haptic alerts and two session lengths round it off. A versatile, well-equipped option for patients who want a long-running dual-use device.

xvape-fog-pro.summary: A convection vaporiser for herb and concentrate with a large battery, for patients wanting flavourful, lasting sessions.
xvape-fog-pro.description: The XVape Fog Pro is a convection device that heats up in around 15 seconds and supports both dry herb and concentrates, with a wax cup included. Temperature is adjustable from 100 to 220C, and the convection chamber gives rich, flavourful draws. A 3200mAh battery covers extended sessions and charges over USB-C. A solid mid-range choice for patients who want convection flavour and battery life that lasts through a long medicating day.

xvape-mambo-cheech-and-chong-vaporizer.summary: A compact convection vaporiser with auto-draw and a removable battery, for patients wanting clean, on-demand vapour.
xvape-mambo-cheech-and-chong-vaporizer.description: The XVape Mambo uses convection heating, vaporising a loosely packed bowl with heated intake air for tastier, less sedating vapour than conduction units that cram the chamber. It offers both on-demand and session modes with auto-draw activation, so it heats as you inhale. The battery is removable, letting you carry spares, and it charges over USB-C with heat-up between 15 and 40 seconds. Food-grade silicone parts and a low price make it an honest entry-level convection option for patients.

zenco-duo.summary: A coil-based vaporiser with interchangeable glass for herb and concentrate, designed for sharing among patients.
zenco-duo.description: The Zenco Duo uses instant coil heating with four temperature presets and interchangeable glass for dry herb, concentrate and a 510 connection. The food-grade silicone diffuser and supplied glasses lift off easily, making it built around shared, group use rather than solo pocket carry. It gives around 12 sessions per charge over USB and weighs 320g, so it is more of a tabletop or social device than a discreet portable. Suits patients who medicate in company and want quick, no-wait heat-up; one-year warranty.

zenco-flow.summary: A coil-based vaporiser with interchangeable glass for herb, concentrate and 510 carts, designed for shared use.
zenco-flow.description: The Zenco Flow uses instant coil heating with four temperature presets and interchangeable glass, covering dry herb, concentrates and 510 cartridges. Like the Duo, the silicone diffuser and supplied glasses detach for easy sharing, with the added 510 compatibility making it the more versatile of the pair. It manages around 12 sessions per charge over USB and weighs 320g, so it sits between social and tabletop use rather than discreet carry. A good fit for patients who use cartridges as well as flower and often medicate in company; one-year warranty.
